_meta.purpose: Canonical sidecoach verb registry. Consumed by sidecoach-keyword.sh (UserPromptSubmit hook) for verb-intent detection, and by the marketing-site cheatsheet generator (T-0010) for documentation rendering.
_meta.matching_rules: Each verb is matched with hyphen-aware word boundaries: (?<![\w-])PATTERN(?![\w-]), case-insensitive. Informational framings (what is X / how to use X / how do I X / X is a / tell me about X / explain X / define X) suppress all firing. Code fences, inline backticks, URLs, XML tag bodies, and transcript markers are stripped from the prompt before matching.
_meta.tie_break: On multiple matches, pick the first verb in this list order.

verbs.description: Plan design approach before building; runs exploration and rapid iteration
verbs.oneLineExplanation: Plans a feature's design approach before any code is written

verbs.description: First-run flows, empty states, activation patterns
verbs.oneLineExplanation: Designs first-run experiences, empty states, and activation funnels

verbs.description: Build a new component from scratch with tokens, implementation, and motion
verbs.oneLineExplanation: Builds a net-new component end-to-end including tokens and motion

verbs.description: Implement production animation with exponential easing and reduced-motion support
verbs.oneLineExplanation: Adds production-grade motion with exponential easing and reduced-motion fallbacks

verbs.description: Increase visual weight, contrast, and presence
verbs.oneLineExplanation: Pushes a design toward more visual weight, contrast, and presence

verbs.description: Color refinement and palette application
verbs.oneLineExplanation: Applies and refines color and palette decisions on a target

verbs.description: Add personality, micro-interactions, and joy
verbs.oneLineExplanation: Adds personality, micro-interactions, and joyful detail to a target

verbs.description: Restructure spatial relationships and visual hierarchy
verbs.oneLineExplanation: Reworks spatial relationships, hierarchy, and structural composition

verbs.description: Amplify a design to maximum expressive effect
verbs.oneLineExplanation: Amplifies design expression to its maximum useful intensity

verbs.description: Refine the type system, font pairing, scale, readability
verbs.oneLineExplanation: Refines typography, font pairing, scale, and readability

verbs.description: Make design language explicit and unambiguous
verbs.oneLineExplanation: Removes ambiguity from design language, labels, and intent

verbs.description: 5-dimension technical audit: a11y, performance, theming, responsive, anti-patterns
verbs.oneLineExplanation: Runs a 5-dimension technical scan for accessibility, performance, theming, responsive, and anti-patterns

verbs.description: Independent design review covering heuristics, cognitive load, and emotional journey
verbs.oneLineExplanation: Runs an independent design review across heuristics, cognitive load, and emotion

verbs.description: 16-point tactical refinement (concentric radius, optical alignment, scale-on-press, more)
verbs.oneLineExplanation: Applies the 16-point tactical refinement checklist as a final-alignment pass

verbs.description: Production-readiness sweep: error states, edge cases, i18n, a11y
verbs.oneLineExplanation: Sweeps a target for production readiness across errors, edge cases, i18n, and a11y

verbs.description: Responsive design across all breakpoints
verbs.oneLineExplanation: Adapts a target across all responsive breakpoints and touch targets

verbs.description: Performance and efficiency improvements
verbs.oneLineExplanation: Tunes a target for performance, efficiency, and runtime cost

verbs.description: Reduce noise and visual complexity
verbs.oneLineExplanation: Reduces visual noise and decorative complexity

verbs.description: Extract and preserve only essential elements
verbs.oneLineExplanation: Strips a target to only its essential elements

verbs.description: Generate the Google-spec DESIGN.md from project HTML/CSS
verbs.oneLineExplanation: Generates a Google-spec DESIGN.md from a project's existing HTML and CSS

verbs.description: Extract design tokens from existing implementation into DESIGN.md
verbs.oneLineExplanation: Pulls reusable tokens and components out of implementation into DESIGN.md

verbs.description: Live browser iteration and real-time refinement
verbs.oneLineExplanation: Iterates on a target live in the browser with real-time refinement
